title: About the Agricultural Production Survey and Census | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Agricultural Production Survey and Census
04 June 2026, 2:00pm
Information about taking part in the Agricultural Production Survey and Census, including why we carry out the survey and census, how we selected you, and how to complete the questionnaire.
To provide vital insights and the most up-to-date data about agriculture’s contribution to New Zealand, Stats NZ regularly collects information from the agriculture sector.
An Agricultural Production Survey is held every year for four consecutive years, followed by a full Agricultural Production Census the following year. The next Agricultural Production Census will be held in July 2027. The census includes all farmers, growers, and foresters and is held every five years.
Agricultural production censuses and surveys are undertaken in partnership with the Ministry for Primary Industries (MPI). Find out more information about joint surveys .

## Benefiting New Zealand
Agricultural statistics benefit New Zealanders by supporting evidence-based discussions and decision-making. They are used by industry organisations, government, researchers, and the wider farming and growing community for:
- industry forecasting
- planning and investment decisions
- national and international reporting.

## Completing the Agricultural Production Survey – online or on paper
The Agricultural Production Survey can be completed online – this is an easy and secure way to do the questionnaire. Follow the instructions in the information pack mailed to all respondents, which includes your unique link to the questionnaire.
Read the ‘Before you begin’ checklist in the online guide to check you have gathered all the required information needed to complete the questionnaire, including:
- share-milking details
- farm location, land details, and land use
The online questionnaire must be completed in one session.
The questions included in this survey are being asked under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Our approach to survey compliance has more information about your legal obligation to participate in the Agricultural Production Survey.
You can request a paper copy of the questionnaire by contacting ag@stats.govt.nz .

## Information to help you complete your survey
- Guide to completing the Agricultural Production Survey Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 608 KB

### Guide to completing the Agricultural Production Survey
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 608 KB
Most computers and browsers can be used to complete the Agricultural Production Survey online. The questionnaire has been tested and optimised for the following internet browsers:
- Internet Explorer 10 and 11
- Firefox 47.0 and above
- Google Chrome v51.0.27 and above
The minimum-security requirement is using an SSL-enabled browser capable of 128-bit encryption.
For more information or help with completing the Agricultural Production Survey, contact ag@stats.govt.nz .
